mapper.sql: id, submission_id, enterprise_id, audit_year, flow_stage, seq_no, source_unit, source_unit_id, target_unit, target_unit_id, energy_product, physical_quantity, standard_quantity, remark, source_type, source_ref_id, target_type, target_ref_id, item_type, item_id, calculated_value, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO de_energy_flow ( submission_id, enterprise_id, audit_year, flow_stage, seq_no, source_unit, source_unit_id, target_unit, target_unit_id, energy_product, physical_quantity, standard_quantity, remark, source_type, source_ref_id, target_type, target_ref_id, item_type, item_id, calculated_value, create_by, update_by ) VALUES ( #{submissionId}, #{enterpriseId}, #{auditYear}, #{flowStage}, #{seqNo}, #{sourceUnit}, #{sourceUnitId}, #{targetUnit}, #{targetUnitId}, #{energyProduct}, #{physicalQuantity}, #{standardQuantity}, #{remark}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRefId}, #{targetType}, #{targetRefId}, #{itemType}, #{itemId}, #{calculatedValue}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE de_energy_flow SET submission_id = #{submissionId}, flow_stage = #{flowStage}, seq_no = #{seqNo}, source_unit = #{sourceUnit}, source_unit_id = #{sourceUnitId}, target_unit = #{targetUnit}, target_unit_id = #{targetUnitId}, energy_product = #{energyProduct}, physical_quantity = #{physicalQuantity}, standard_quantity = #{standardQuantity}, remark = #{remark}, source_type = #{sourceType}, source_ref_id = #{sourceRefId}, target_type = #{targetType}, target_ref_id = #{targetRefId}, item_type = #{itemType}, item_id = #{itemId}, calculated_value = #{calculatedValue}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
